mnemonics: My Important Knowledge Encompasses Creating, Testing, and Releasing Efficient, Logical Libraries (MIKE COTTERELL)
Cotterell's Code: Organize, Test, Track, Engineer, Release, Evaluate, Link, Learn
keyPoints: Mike Cotterell is a Senior Academic Professional at Georgia Tech who teaches the Software Development Process course.
His teachings emphasize modern Agile and DevOps practices, including CI/CD, automated testing, and version control with Git.
He focuses on the practical application of software engineering principles to build reliable and maintainable systems.
commonMistakes: Assuming 'Mike Cotterell' is a software engineering concept or model rather than a person and an instructor.
Focusing on memorizing his name instead of understanding the core software engineering practices he teaches (e.g., CI/CD, testing).
Confusing his specific course material with the entire field of software engineering and project management.
